GMCM_keyboardSectionTitle_description: Settings for Keyboard Mode(these only apply when the Pet UI is in use)
GMCM_gamepadSectionTitle_description: Settings for Gamepad Mode(these only apply when the Pet UI is in use)
GMCM_GamepadLayoutOption_description: Select the layout for Gamepad Mode(purely aesthetic)
GMCM_GrabItemButtonOption_description:
Grabs items while inside the Pet Inventory. 
Also works as confirmation button.
GMCM_StackItemButtonOption_description:
Stacks items while inside the Pet Inventory. 
Also works as confirmation button.
GMCM_CloseUIButtonOption_description: Button for closing the Pet UI
GMCM_OpenPetInventoryButtonOption_descri: Quick access to the pet's Inventory (while inside the Pet UI)
GMCM_OpenPetStatusWindowButtonOption_des: Quick access to the pet's Status Window (while inside the Pet UI)
GMCM_OpenPetHatSlotButtonOption_descript: Quick access to the pet's Hat Slot (while inside the Pet UI)
GMCM_OpenPetAccessorySlotButtonOption_de: Quick access to the pet's Accessory Slot (while inside the Pet UI)
GMCM_SubstituteButtonForLShiftOnGamepadO:
Left Shift + 'Grab Item button' sends selected items directly to different inventories. 
Left Shift + 'Stack item button' picks half the stack of the selected item.
GMCM_UseL1R1ShortcutsOption_description: Use L1 & R1 buttons as shorcuts for quickly changing the pet's background and/or facing direction while inside the Pet Status Window.
GMCM_keyboardActionButtomTooltip:
Button which lets you interact with a pet. 
If this option doesn't have a value assigned, it'll use the settings from the current session.
GMCM_keyboardStatusTab_hotkeyTooltip: Quick access to the pet's Status Window (while inside the Pet UI)
GMCM_keyboardInventoryTab_hotkeyTooltip: Quick access to the pet's Inventory (while inside the Pet UI)
GMCM_keyboardHatTab_hotkeyTooltip: Quick access to the pet's Hat Slot (while inside the Pet UI)
GMCM_keyboardAccessoryTab_hotkeyTooltip: Quick access to the pet's Accessory Slot (while inside the Pet UI)
GMCM_substituteDNumpadWithSymbolsTooltip:
Substitute the icons for the D Numpad keys with their equivalent symbols. 
Used by the Pet Dialogue Window.
PetHasBeenGivenTreatAlready_0: Giving too many treats to your pet is not good for it's overall health.
PetHasBeenGivenTreatAlready_1: Remember not to give too many treats to your pet at once.
PetDoesntWantMoreTreats_0: {{PetName}} no longer wants to eat that.
PetDoesntWantMoreTreats_1: {{PetName}} doesn't want to eat that anymore.
PetProgressedWithLesson_RandomAns_1: {{PetName}} has made a progress in the {{LessonName}} lesson.
PetProgressedWithLesson_RandomAns_2: {{PetName}} has progressed positively in the {{LessonName}} lesson.
PetProgressedWithLesson_RandomAns_3: {{PetName}} has learned new things today, {{LessonName}} lesson progress up!
PetNeedsABreakAlert: {{PetName}} needs a break from training, wait for tomorrow to train again.
NotEnoughTreatsAlert: You don't have enough 'Treats' for this lesson.
PetManual_Description:
A manual on how to train your pet. 
Use it on a pet to help it learn new tricks.
PetBackpack_Description:
Increases the amount of inventory slots on a pet. 
Click on a pet to equip it.
DogTreats_Description:
'The best way to give love to your canine friend.'
Can be given to dogs.
CatTreats_Description:
'The best way to give love to your feline friend.'
Can be given to cats.
CrunchyTreats_Description:
'Special treats adapted to the palate of the vast majority of species.'
Can be given to pets.
PetFlute_Description:
Call your pet from far away. 
Only works on trained enough pets. 
Use it outside.
PetFluteWarningNoTrainedPets: You need at least one 'Fully-Trained' pet.
TooManyPetsOnYourTeamPetFluteWarning: Cannot use item. Team is already full.
NoPetsAvailable: There are no available pets to call right now.
NoSpaceToCallPet: There isn't enough space to call a pet.
MarnieGiftsPetFluteMail_content: Dear @.^^There's something I forgot to give you along with yesterday's letter.^^It is called a '{{PetFluteItemName}}', and with this item you'll be able to call your pet from anywhere, as long as you have a fully 'trained' pet somewhere that can hear you.^^I hope you find it as useful as I did and that it helps you bond even further with your pets! ^^See you soon! ^-Marnie
MarnieGiftsLuxuryCollarMail_content: Dear @.^^I'm happy to see you getting along with your pet. I see you've been doing pretty well lately; that's why I want to give you something as congratulations.^^This product is named '{{LuxuryCollarItemName}},' which your pet can use for a couple of benefits; it also has an adjustable buckle that fits any size.^^The product details it in more depth.^-Marnie
MarnieGiftsLightweightCollarMail_content: Dear @.^^I'm happy to see you getting along with your pet, and because you seem like a pretty active person, I figured you might like this gift.^^The recipe is for a product named '{{LightweightCollarItemName}},' which your pet can use for a couple of benefits; it also has an adjustable buckle that fits any size.^^The recipe details it in more depth.^-Marnie
MarnieGiftsRoughCollarMail_content: Dear @.^^I'm happy to see you getting along with your pet, and because you seem pretty strong, I figured you might like this gift.^^The recipe is for a product named '{{RoughLookingCollarItemName}},' which your pet can use for a couple of benefits; it also has an adjustable buckle that fits any size.^^The recipe details it in more depth.^-Marnie
MarnieGiftsFloweryCollarMail_content: Dear @.^^I'm happy to see you getting along with your pet. Since you seem to be good at foraging, I figured you might like this gift.^^The recipe is for a product named '{{FloweryCollarItemName}},' which your pet can use for a couple of benefits; it also has an adjustable buckle that fits any size.^^The recipe details it in more depth.^-Marnie
MarnieGiftsSeagoingCollarMail_content: Dear @.^^I'm happy to see you getting along with your pet. Since you seem like a pretty skilled fisherman, I figured you might like this gift.^^The recipe is for a product named '{{SeagoingCollarItemName}},' which your pet can use for a couple of benefits; it also has an adjustable buckle that fits any size.^^The recipe details it in more depth.^-Marnie
LuxuryCollar_Description:
Increases team's chances of getting quality products and chances of getting double loot when foraging or fishing by 10%.

- Pet exclusive
LightweightCollar_Description:
Boost the player's movement speed by 4%. 
Reduces the holder's attack cooldown by 15%. 

- Pet exclusive
RoughCollar_Description:
Increases the holder's total damage output by 25% and critical strike chance by 10%.

- Pet exclusive
FloweryCollar_Description:
Boosts the holder's foraging skills. 
Greatly reduces the chances of getting trash when foraging.

- Pet exclusive
SeagoingCollar_Description:
Boosts the holder's fishing skills. 
Greatly reduces the chances of getting trash when fishing.

- Pet exclusive
SkillPerk_Description_0: Increased energy gained per second while waiting.
SkillPerk_Description_1: Reduced energy consumption when using skills.
SkillPerk_Description_4: 4% increase in player movement speed while [{{FollowSkillName}}] skill is in use.
SkillPerk_Description_6: 75% chance to get silver quality products.
SkillPerk_Description_7: 50% chance to get gold quality products.
SkillPerk_Description_8: 25% chance to get iridium quality products.
SkillPerk_Description_14: 30% chance to recover a portion of the player's health after slaying a monster.
FeatureOnDevelopment: This feature is still on development.
